buttons.addTooltip: Add this category to your custom collection

settings.title: Settings
settings.avoidRepeatsHint: Every letter is drawn once before any repeats.

categories.title: Categories
categories.minimumRequired: Add categories to your deck to play.
categories.emptyDeck: The deck is empty. Add a pack or a custom category.

modal.title: How to play
modal.objectiveText: Score points by writing words that fit each category and start with the drawn letter.
gameplayPoints: A random letter is drawn. Every answer must start with it.
Write one word for each category before the timer runs out (90 seconds by default).
Playing with others: answers nobody else wrote score 1 point, matching answers score 0.
modal.categoriesText: The deck comes with a set of built-in categories, and you can add your own.
categoriesItems: Customize the deck to add categories and built-in packs, or remove any you'd rather skip.
Pin a category to lock it into every round; unpinned ones are drawn at random to fill the rest.
Reroll to draw a fresh set of categories for the current letter, without changing the letter.
modal.attribution: Scattergories is the original party game by Hasbro. This is a free, unofficial companion for playing it around the table. Browse the <official>official game</official> or this app's <repo>source code</repo>, released under the <license>MIT license</license>.
modal.privacy: This app stores settings and custom categories in your browser only.

errors.chunkTitle: A fresh app version is ready.
errors.chunkBody: One of the interface chunks changed while the app was open. Reload to continue safely.
errors.boundaryBody: Reload the app to reset the current round and continue playing.
